strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_DESCRIPTION: El Mercenario Némesis es un superviviente rápido de corto alcance, con las herramientas para dominar cualquier combate.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..y así se fue, con un nuevo propósito en cada caparazón.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ...y así desapareció, con las municiones vacías y el corazón aún más vacío.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_LORE:
“Hey!“


A figure slowly hobbled out from the sandy Martian dunes, tuning into Fort Laughn's external communications. “Hey, mind letting me in? Dust out here is killing me.“



One of the stationed guards on the outer fence quipped back from a booth. “...You got credentials, sir?“



“Come on, you don't recognize me? Let me guess- new recruit? Something like that?“ The figure continued walking nonchalantly toward the fence as a second guard piped up. “Hold on. Is that Vantre?“ The guest laughed, still wandering every-which-way as he came closer to the fence. “Guilty as charged. Thought I'd stop by while I'm in the area. Say hey to some old comrades, maybe.“



The guards paused, then, on a separate line, rang up their CO. “Commanding Officer Byren, Vantre's at the outer fence. He appears non-threatening, which is an immediate red flag. What're your orders?“



Byren's scratchy, exasperated voice chirped back through the receiver. “Ugh, damnit� Page the suppression crew. Make sure he's not trying anything, alright? Keep him busy until you've got more people out there.“ The guard relayed the order- “Get a crew out here. I'll make sure Vantre doesn't try anything stupid.“ The recruit replied with a question: “Sure, but, uhh� Where'd he go?“



Sure enough, Vantre had vanished while the two were distracted, leaving nothing but sparks in the air where he once stood. It took the entirety of the fort's stationed force about ten minutes to figure out what was going on- and they found out at about the same time they found their commanding officer dead in his quarters, the back of his head blasted to smithereens.
strings.SS2_KEYWORD_BLEEDING: SangradoOfertas 240% de daño base en 3 s. El sangrado puede apilarse.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_PRIMARY_SHOTGUN_DE: <style=cIsUtility>Agile</style>. Dispara una ráfaga de escopeta que inflige <style=cIsDamage>6x80% de daño</style>, y nuevamente cuando la sueltas. Puede contener hasta 2 conchas.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SECONDARY_SLASH_DE: <style=cIsDamage>Staggering.</style> Estocada y corte para <style=cIsDamage>2x300% de daño</style>.  <style=cIsUtility>Se puede usar mientras corre</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SECONDARY_KNIFE_DE:
<style=cIsHealth>Bleeding.</style> Lanza un cuchillo para <style=cIsDamage>100% de daño</style>. 
<style=cIsDamage>Slayer.</style> Acércate para arrancarlo y causar <style=cIsDamage>400% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_UTILITY_BLINK_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Blink</style> detrás de un enemigo o <style=cIsUtility>vector de ataque.</style>
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_UTILITY_SLIDE_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning.</style> Mantén presionado <style=cIsUtility>slide</style> mientras preparas una carrera dirigida que inflige <style=cIsDamage>600% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_SCAN_DESCR: Muestra vectores de ataque <style=cIsUtility></style> alrededor de hasta <style=cIsDamage>4</style> enemigos cercanos. <style=cIsUtility>Muévete a la posición</style> para lanzarte hacia adelante, causando <style=cIsDamage>1200% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_CLONE_DESC: Invoca un clon <style=cIsUtility></style> detrás de un objetivo que <style=cIsDamage> copia tus habilidades</style>. Vuelve a lanzarlo para correr hacia él, causando <style=cIsDamage>800% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_CLONE_DASH: Corre hacia tu clon, causando <style=cIsDamage>800% de daño</style>.
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_SC:
Muestra vectores de ataque <style=cIsUtility></style> alrededor de hasta <style=cIsDamage>4</style> enemigos cercanos. <style=cIsUtility>Muévete a la posición</style> para correr hacia adelante, causando <style=cIsDamage>1500% de daño</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: revela 2 vectores de ataque adicionales e inflige 1500% de daño.</color>
strings.SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_CL:
Invoca un clon <style=cIsUtility></style> detrás de un objetivo que <style=cIsDamage> copia tus habilidades</style>. Vuelve a lanzarlo para correr hacia él, lo que inflige <style=cIsDamage>800 % de daño</style>.
<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: obtienes un desplazamiento adicional.</color>
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_MASTER: As Nemesis Mercenary, beat the game or obliterate on Monsoon or harder.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_GRANDM: As Nemesis Mercenary, beat the game or obliterate on Typhoon.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_NEMESI: As Nemesis Mercenary, defeat Mercenary's vestige.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_CLONE_: As Nemesis Mercenary, purchase a Duplicator Drone.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_KNIFE_: As Nemesis Mercenary, defeat a different vestige.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SLIDE_: As Nemesis Mercenary, complete a stage without leaving the ground.
